spec_match.rationale: Beautifully accesses the property parameters natively while providing a feature-detect logic fallback path.

interactive.rationale: Exceptional interactive dashboard! Draws animated frames inside canvas viewports, calculates ratios, plots a real-time dual line canvas chart, and controls a health rating bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect match to the stream statistics modeling and budget diagnostics concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Features a highly precise mathematical pipeline simulation loop for browsers without native support, and closes frame slots cleanly.

references.rationale: Includes the mandatory ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Superb styling with clean metric grids, system variables, and aligned margins.

summary: The health-monitor is a visual interactive dashboard with canvas charts, live loops, and the required ChromeStatus reference footer link.
